campaigns.name: graph_poisoning_non_finite_edge
campaigns.expected_behavior: reject NaN, infinite, and dangling graph inputs before simulation
campaigns.actual_behavior: ContagionEdge::new returns GraphError::NonFiniteWeight; ContagionGraph::add_edge returns GraphError::UnknownTarget
campaigns.remediation_hint: keep graph admission fail-closed before simulator entry

campaigns.name: edge_obfuscation_shadow_package
campaigns.expected_behavior: namespace-shadow edge below threshold does not activate the payload chain
campaigns.remediation_hint: quarantine namespace-shadow edges below activation threshold

campaigns.name: fake_low_risk_pivot_aggregate_exposure
campaigns.expected_behavior: two weak independent edges aggregate into a pivot escalation while the critical service remains bounded
campaigns.remediation_hint: aggregate weak independent edges before assigning low-risk status

campaigns.name: delayed_activation_accumulation
campaigns.expected_behavior: retained exposure memory catches dormant-to-active activation by step 3
campaigns.remediation_hint: retain exposure memory for dormant-to-active activation chains
